summary: Comprehensive backend API testing of TradeAI platform. 20/22 tests passing (91%). All requested endpoints work correctly (auth, users, strategy CRUD, deploy, auto-trade engine start/stop/status/positions/activity/risk, market quote, portfolio, news, sentiment, alerts CRUD, orders). Two failures are caused by upstream/infrastructure issues, not backend bugs: (1) /api/v1/strategy/generate occasionally hits Cloudflare 502 because LLM (Claude Sonnet 4.6) takes 50-90s and the ingress gateway sometimes returns 502 mid-stream; the endpoint succeeds when called against localhost:8001 directly. (2) /api/v1/strategy/backtest returns 400 'No candle data available' because yfinance historical chart endpoint (range=6mo/1mo/3mo) returns empty JSON for RELIANCE.NS - Yahoo Finance rate limiting / upstream flakiness. Single-bar /market/quote still works.

minor.issue: Health endpoint is defined at /health (no /api prefix) so it is NOT reachable via the public ingress (Cloudflare routes only /api/* to backend). Internal call to http://localhost:8001/health works fine. Recommend adding an /api/health alias for external monitoring.

LLM call frequently takes 50-90s; Cloudflare ingress intermittently returns 502 before backend finishes. Add streaming/async job pattern (return 202 + polling) for production. Internal call always succeeds.

Returns 400 'No candle data available for RELIANCE (1d/6mo)' because yfinance.download(period=6mo/1mo/3mo) returns empty/JSON-decode-error. yfinance is unreliable from this container's egress; consider caching candle data or using a backup data source (NSE bhavcopy, AlphaVantage, etc.).

Route is registered as '/' which causes FastAPI to 307-redirect '/api/v1/orders' -> '/api/v1/orders/'. Through Cloudflare this drops the Authorization header on some clients (we saw 403 in Python requests). Recommend setting app = FastAPI(redirect_slashes=False) or registering both '' and '/'.

action_items: Make /api/v1/strategy/generate async/non-blocking (e.g. return job_id immediately + poll endpoint, or stream chunks) to avoid Cloudflare 502 gateway timeouts on long LLM calls.

Harden backtest data source: yfinance historical chart endpoint is unreliable from this container; add retry with backoff, cache historical candles in PostgreSQL, or fall back to a secondary provider.
Add an /api/health alias (or move /health under /api/) so external monitoring/uptime checks can reach it through the public ingress.
Configure FastAPI with redirect_slashes=False (or register both '' and '/' routes) on routers like /api/v1/orders to avoid 307->auth-strip behavior.
Alert schema requires 'target_value' (not 'target_price') and 'channels' must be one of ['in_app','telegram','email'] - document in API docs / OpenAPI examples.
critical_code_review_comments: main.py lifespan starts auto_trade_engine globally for ALL users — confirm singleton design is intentional vs per-user (positions/risk_config are global state right now).
Several routers (auth.py, strategy.py) catch generic exceptions and re-raise as 401/400 (see backend log 'Database error: 401: Incorrect email or password.') — error logger label is misleading.
yfinance is called synchronously from request handlers (~30s blocking on chart fetches). Should be moved to a background task or cached in DB to keep API latency bounded.
Strategy /deploy?mode=paper accepts the mode as query param, but body-based modes would be more consistent with /auto-trade/start which uses JSON body.
Multiple endpoints return raw lists without pagination (e.g. /strategy, /orders/, /alerts) — add limit/offset for production scale.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed strategies and alerts. Alerts are deleted after creation; strategies remain (no DELETE strategy test in scope).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 22 backend test cases live in /app/backend/tests/test_tradeai_backend.py. Run with: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_tradeai_backend.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/tradeai_results.xml. The two persistent failures (strategy/generate 502 and strategy/backtest 400) are NOT backend bugs — first is Cloudflare 502 on long LLM calls (internal call succeeds), second is yfinance historical endpoint returning empty data (try localhost:8001 and a fresh ticker to confirm). If main agent fixes long-running endpoint to be async or adds candle caching, re-run those two tests.

rca_of_the_issue.strategy_generate_502: Cloudflare ingress in front of the preview URL has a finite request budget. LiteLLM->Claude Sonnet 4.6 call takes 45-90s. Sometimes the ingress returns 502 before backend finishes. Confirmed by direct curl to http://localhost:8001/api/v1/strategy/generate which returns 200 in ~50s with valid strategy JSON. Mitigation: switch to async job pattern or streaming response.
rca_of_the_issue.strategy_backtest_400: yfinance.download('RELIANCE.NS', period='6mo'|'1mo'|'3mo') returns JSONDecodeError (empty body from Yahoo). Backend correctly maps this to HTTP 400 'No candle data available'. The single-bar quote endpoint (range=1d) works because it hits a different Yahoo URL that is not rate-limited. Mitigation: cache candles in PostgreSQL on first fetch, add retry/backoff, or use a secondary data provider.
rca_of_the_issue.orders_403: FastAPI default redirect_slashes=True caused '/api/v1/orders' -> '/api/v1/orders/' 307. Through Cloudflare, requests library dropped Authorization on redirect causing 403. Fixed in test by using trailing slash; recommended fix is redirect_slashes=False.
